description: Vulnerability in the JD Edwards EnterpriseOne Solution Advisor product of Oracle JD Edwards (component: Solution Advisor).   The supported version that is affected is 9.2. Easily exploitable vulnerability allows low privileged attacker with network access via HTTP to compromise JD Edwards EnterpriseOne Solution Advisor.  Successful attacks of this vulnerability can result in takeover of JD Edwards EnterpriseOne Solution Advisor. CVSS 3.1 Base Score 8.8 (Confidentiality, Integrity and Availability impacts).  CVSS Vector: (CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H).
